parsed_output.justification: Tyler claims to be the Drunk, but he simultaneously asserts that he knows Erin is the Werewolf. According to the game rules, the Drunk swaps their card with one from the center without looking at it and gains no information about other players. This contradiction indicates that Tyler is lying about his role to divert suspicion, making him the most likely Werewolf.
